title: nf-core/taxprofiler pipeline - params.database schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.database

tool.errorMessage: Invalid tool name. Please see documentation for all supported profilers. Currently these classifers are included: humann, humann4, metaphlan, fmhfunprofiler.

db_name.errorMessage: The unique name of the database should be provided.

db_entity.errorMessage: The unique name of the database entity should be provided. (eg, for HUMAnN, specify whether db_path is the humann_nucleotide, humann_protein, or humann_metaphlan database)

db_params.errorMessage: Invalid database db_params entry. No quotes allowed.

db_path.errorMessage: db_path should be either a file path or a directory.
